{{Infobox character
| name = Rellask
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Rellask]] is a prince of [[Karosha]] and the son of [[Queen Shyrax]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Rellask]] is Shyrax's son.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Rellask]] is a Prince.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
